title: Savory Crumbly Light Gluten-Free Flour Crumble
description: A savory crumbly dish featuring brandy, kneaded into a light and gluten-free flour base with notes of Norwegian cuisine.

ingredients.name: 3 cups (750ml) gluten-free flour blend
ingredients.notes: Choose a blend that includes almond, coconut, and rice flours.

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a baking dish.
In a mixing bowl, combine gluten-free flour blend, sugar, softened butter and ghee. Stir in salt and egg white until well combined and slightly crumbly.
If using brandy, stir it into the mixture at this stage for added depth of flavor.
Transfer the crumble to the prepared baking dish and press gently with your fingers to ensure even distribution and firmness.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown. Allow to cool slightly before serving.
Optional: Serve with yogurt or as a topping for berry compote.
